    Method
    Description

    Handles the DOWN event from the GUI.

    Handles the NEW_GAME event from the GUI.

    Handles the RIGHT event from the GUI.
    ViewData
    GameController.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE_CCW (counter-clockwise) event from the GUI.
    ViewData
    GameController.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE (clockwise) event from the GUI.
    ViewData
    GameController.onSoftDropEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the SOFT_DROP event from the GUI.

    Methods in com.comp2042.event.listener with parameters of type MoveEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DownData
    BrickMovementListener.onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles DOWN event (user or automatic).
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onHardDropEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles HARD_DROP event (instant drop).
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onHoldEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles HOLD event (store brick for later).
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles LEFT event.
    void
    GameControlListener.onNewGameEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles NEW_GAME event.
    void

    Handles PAUSE event.
    void

    Handles QUIT event.
    void
    GameControlListener.onResumeEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles RESUME event.
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles RIGHT event.
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE_CCW event (counterclockwise).
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE event (clockwise).
    ViewData
    BrickMovementListener.onSoftDropEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles SOFT_DROP event (faster descent).

    Methods in com.comp2042.model.state with parameters of type MoveEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DownData
    GameOverState.onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the DOWN event during game over.
    DownData
    GameState.onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles DOWN event.
    DownData
    PausedState.onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the DOWN event during pause.
    DownData
    PlayingState.onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the DOWN event (both user-initiated and automatic descent).
    ViewData
    GameOverState.onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the LEFT event during game over.
    ViewData
    GameState.onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles LEFT event.
    ViewData
    PausedState.onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the LEFT event during pause.
    ViewData
    PlayingState.onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the LEFT event by attempting to move the brick left.
    ViewData
    GameOverState.onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the RIGHT event during game over.
    ViewData
    GameState.onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles RIGHT event.
    ViewData
    PausedState.onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the RIGHT event during pause.
    ViewData
    PlayingState.onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the RIGHT event by attempting to move the brick right.
    ViewData
    GameOverState.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE_CCW (counterclockwise) event during game over.
    ViewData
    GameState.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE_CCW event.
    ViewData
    PausedState.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE_CCW (counterclockwise) event during pause.
    ViewData
    PlayingState.onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE_CCW event by attempting to rotate the brick counterclockwise.
    ViewData
    GameOverState.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE event during game over.
    ViewData
    GameState.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE event.
    ViewData
    PausedState.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE event during pause.
    ViewData
    PlayingState.onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles the ROTATE event by attempting to rotate the brick clockwise.
